name: My Score Restoration
description_short: Dallas-based credit repair company that disputes errors on credit reports and works to improve credit scores through removal of erroneous information.
description_long:
My Score Restoration is a credit repair service based in Dallas, Texas, operating out of Suite 309 at 10925 Estate Lane. The company positions itself as a credit control specialist focused on helping consumers improve their financial standing by addressing inaccuracies on their credit profiles.

The company's core service offering includes credit restoration, debt settlement, and debt collection services. According to their website, they work on behalf of clients to delete erroneous information from credit reports and help lower debt. They emphasize a consultative approach, offering free consultations and tailoring action plans to individual circumstances.

My Score Restoration distinguishes itself through claims of speed and security in their operations. Their marketing emphasizes an "effective, fast, secure" service model with a "proven method" for achieving timely results. The company maintains standard business amenities including parking, WiFi, wheelchair accessibility, and accepts both debit and credit cards. They operate Monday through Friday from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM and serve the Dallas-Fort Worth area.

As a credit repair company with minimal online presence beyond their UENI-hosted profile and only one Google review on record (as of the provided data), the company lacks substantial third-party validation. The website contains generic credit repair messaging without specific case studies, success rates, or detailed methodology. Consumers should verify licensing, complaint history, and specific guarantees before engaging services, as credit repair claims require careful scrutiny.
pros: Offers free initial consultation to assess individual credit situations
Provides tailored action plans rather than one-size-fits-all approach
Operates during convenient weekday hours (10 AM-6 PM Monday-Friday)
Physical office location in Dallas provides in-person accessibility
Accepts multiple payment methods including debit and credit cards
Wheelchair accessible location accommodates clients with mobility needs
Serves the broader Dallas-Fort Worth metropolitan area
cons: Minimal online presence and social proof—only one Google review visible
Website contains no specific success rates, timelines, or case studies to verify claims
No clear explanation of dispute methodology or compliance with FCRA regulations
Vague language about "proven methods" without substantiation or transparency
No information about licensing, certifications, or regulatory standing provided
best_for: Dallas-area residents with credit report errors who prefer face-to-face consultation
Consumers seeking localized credit repair without national call centers
Individuals with limited online research preference and access to physical office visits
diagnosis: My Score Restoration targets Dallas-area consumers seeking credit repair through dispute of inaccurate information. Primary caveat: The company lacks substantial public validation, transparent methodology, and regulatory information—consumers should independently verify licensing, complaint history with the FTC and state attorney general, and FCRA compliance before engagement.
services: Erroneous information removal from credit reports
